name: cep_exp_boundary_past
drl: rule R when exists E1() P() then end
_finding: D-152 (D-133 boundary corrected): a NONNEG past deadline (0 <= deadline <= clock) enqueues the expire action in the SAME flush — the event matches/fires this cycle and drops at quiescence. E1(ts=-101, deadline exactly 0) inserted at clock 50: satisfies transiently (P1 re-fires [1]), then retracts; P2 later stays held (no witness) — firings [1 | 1 | ] and no E1 in the final WM. Pre-D-152 the engine leaked it (kept forever => P2 would fresh-fire). Oracle xq2.
